    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.and(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create an AND gate (top fails only if all children fail).
    static FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.basic(String name, double probability)
    Create a basic event leaf.
    static FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.or(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create an OR gate (top fails if any child fails).
    static FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.voting(String name, int k, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create a k-of-n voting gate.
    FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.withCCF(double beta)
    Apply a β-factor common-cause failure correction to this gate (only valid for OR / VOTING).

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    FaultTreeAnalyzer.collectBasicNames(FaultTreeNode node, List<String> out)

    FaultTreeAnalyzer.evaluateLogical(FaultTreeNode node, Set<String> failedSet)
     
    Set<List<String>>
    FaultTreeAnalyzer.minimalCutSets(FaultTreeNode root, int maxCardinality)
    Enumerate minimal cut sets (sets of basic events whose simultaneous failure causes the top).
    static FaultTreeNode
    FaultTreeNode.or(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create an OR gate (top fails if any child fails).
    double
    FaultTreeAnalyzer.topEventProbability(FaultTreeNode node)
    Compute top-event probability using gate-specific combinatorics, with rare-event approximation for OR gates (P ≈ Σ p_i bounded ≤ 1).
